data.title: Nvidia’s Financial Exposure: Risks from Long-Term Commitments and Guarantees
data.description:
Nvidia Corporation (NVDA) has disclosed a new risk, in the Debt & Financing category.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Nvidia Corporation faces potential financial risks due to its involvement in commercial arrangements that include long-term capacity purchase obligations and financial guarantees. These commitments expose the company to counterparty risks, such as partners’ inability to secure necessary financing or infrastructure, project delays, or financial distress. Despite mitigation efforts, if these obligations are triggered, they could necessitate significant payments, adversely affecting Nvidia’s business, financial condition, or operational results.

Overall, Wall Street has a Strong Buy consensus rating on NVDA stock based on 39 Buys, 1 Sell and 1 Hold.

data.title: Air Products and Chemicals Faces Financial Risks Amid Economic Fluctuations and Credit Market Disruptions
data.description:
Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (APD) has disclosed a new risk, in the Economy & Political Environment category.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. faces potential financial challenges due to fluctuations in global and regional economic conditions, which may affect their ability to secure financing. Disruptions in credit, capital, and money markets could lead to increased borrowing costs or difficulties in obtaining necessary funds, impacting their cash flow and financial stability. Additionally, changes in their debt ratings by independent agencies could further elevate borrowing expenses or hinder access to financing. These factors collectively pose a risk to the company’s operations and financial outcomes.

The average APD stock price target is $313.46, implying 24.84% upside potential.
